remarkList.remark: Corrected for April and May crews.
I added ports and VMS will not let me edit days without haveing -900k. If I leave the days, we have -262k but the TCE is close to the original generation.
Corrected August Crew adjustments in Expense.
Corrected remaining hire down by 31 days to counter the December hire being added in

Don't forget to balance the crew. When you add in the revenue section to show us invoicing Pbras, you have to add an expense to show us paying out to IMS. 
Once we receive any adjustments from Pbras, it will be amended with a negative in expense.
